name: @afterroar/rec-engine-saga
description: Saga — Monte Carlo simulator + per-player fun model. The breakthrough engine: predicts expected fun per player per game-night via forward simulation, trained on recap data. Phase 0 scaffold only; activates after ~6 months of recap data accumulation. See README.md, docs/design-notes.md, docs/simulator-architecture.md, docs/recap-as-training-data.md.

scripts.test: echo 'saga has no tests yet — scaffold only. See SPRINT_LOG.md for activation triggers.' && exit 0
